policy.introduction: Welcome to Remedi, developed by VSM Development ("we," "our," or "us"). Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how our app handles personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
policy.data-collection: We do not directly collect or store personal data. However, our app uses third-party services that may collect data to improve functionality, serve ads, and analyze app performance. These services include:
policy.service-note: These third-party services may collect personal data as described in their respective privacy policies.
policy.third-party-desc: The third-party services integrated into Remedi may collect information such as:

third-party.usage: Usage data for analytics and crash reporting

policy.third-party-note: We do not control how these third parties collect, store, or use data. Please review their privacy policies for more information:
policy.storage-desc: We do not store any user data locally or on external servers. However, Google may automatically back up app-related data as part of their services. We do not control Google's backup process or data retention policies.

rights.access: Right to Access: You can review data collected by third parties (where applicable).
rights.deletion: Right to Deletion: While we do not store user data, you may be able to request data deletion from Google services.
rights.restrict: Right to Restrict Processing: You can disable personalized ads in your Google account settings.

policy.rights-note: For any concerns related to data processing, you may contact Google directly through their privacy settings.
policy.security-desc: While we do not store data ourselves, third-party services we use implement security measures to protect user data. However, we do not guarantee complete security of third-party data handling.
policy.children-desc: Our app is intended for adult users but does not contain harmful content for children. However, as it includes third-party services that may collect data, parental guidance is recommended.
policy.changes-desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted within the app and/or on our website.
policy.contact-desc: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
policy.agreement: By using Remedi, you agree to the terms outlined in this Privacy Policy.

about.title: About Us
about.who-are-we-p: We are a passionate mobile development enterprise driven by the goal of solving everyday problems through smart technology. Our journey began with the creation of the Pill Reminder app, a tool designed to help users stay on top of their health.
about.our-mission-p: To develop user-centered Android applications that enhance productivity and well-being, delivering reliable mobile solutions that make life easier.
about.our-story-p: In 2023, the company's founder began his journey into Android development, creating his first commercial app (Pill Reminder) for his final course work in Computer Engineering. His passion for mobile development continued after the end of his work, leading him to continue in the field and seek professionalization.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Help us to continue improving our apps.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: An Android application for helping users to track their medicines doses

features-list.schedule-alarms: Schedule alarms to remind users about their medicines
features-list.receive-notifications: Receive notifications if user does not mark medicine as used in the application
features-list.set-treatment-period: Allows users to set a treatment period or receive alarms until medicine deletion
features-list.daily-notifications: Receive daily notifications after setting a pillbox refill reminder
features-list.list-treatments: List all ongoing and ended treatments
features-list.warn-user: Warn user if he pretends to mark a medicine as used close to the next dose hour

404.title: 404 - Page Not Found
404.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.
